python.title: Python for Beginners
python.description: Learn Python step by step with beginner-friendly lessons and hands-on practice.

python-0.title: Module 0 — Foundations
python-0.description: Workspace + programming basics: IPO model, syntax, and comments.
outcomes: Navigate the editor, Run button, and terminal
Understand what syntax is and why SyntaxError happens
why: Sets up the mental model and workspace skills
Prevents beginner confusion before writing bigger programs

python-1.title: Module 1 — Core Building Blocks
python-1.description: Variables, data types, operators, expressions, strings, and mini-program patterns.
outcomes: Store values in variables and explain basic data types
Use operators and expressions to compute results
Work with strings using print, f-strings, indexing, and methods
Build mini-programs using Ask → Convert → Compute → Show
why: These are the building blocks behind almost every beginner program
They make conditionals and loops feel much more natural in the next module

python-2.title: Module 2 — Control Flow + Collections
python-2.description: Conditionals, loops, lists, and functions stitched into simple beginner mini-projects.
outcomes: Use if, elif, and else with comparisons and boolean logic
Write while loops for validation and repeating actions
Use for loops to iterate through ranges and lists
Use lists to store and work with many values
Write reusable functions with parameters and return values
why: This is where programs start to feel alive through decisions and repetition
Lists and functions unlock more realistic mini-app structure

python-0-foundations.title: Module 0 — Foundations
python-0-foundations.description: Workspace + programming basics: editor, terminal, IPO model, syntax, and comments.
bullets: Workspace tour: editor, Run button, and terminal

python-1-core-building-blocks.title: Module 1 — Core Building Blocks
python-1-core-building-blocks.description: Learn variables, data types, operators, strings, and mini-program patterns.

python-2-control-flow-collections.title: Module 2 — Control Flow + Collections
python-2-control-flow-collections.description: Learn conditionals, loops, lists, and functions through beginner-friendly practice.
bullets: Conditionals: if / elif / else and boolean logic
Lists: storing many values and iterating through them
Functions: parameters, return values, and reuse
